28 #ifndef STD_MSGS_BUILTIN_STRING_H
29 #define STD_MSGS_BUILTIN_STRING_H
30 
31 #include "trait_macros.h"
32 #include <std_msgs/String.h>
33 
34 namespace ros
35 {
36 namespace message_traits
37 {
38 
39 template<class ContainerAllocator>
40 struct MD5Sum<std::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, ContainerAllocator> >
41 {
42  static const char* value()
43  {
44  ROS_STATIC_ASSERT(MD5Sum<std_msgs::String>::static_value1 == 0x992ce8a1687cec8cULL);
45  ROS_STATIC_ASSERT(MD5Sum<std_msgs::String>::static_value2 == 0x8bd883ec73ca41d1ULL);
46  return MD5Sum<std_msgs::String_<ContainerAllocator> >::value();
47  }
48 
49  static const char* value(const std::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, ContainerAllocator>&)
50  {
51  return value();
52  }
53 };
54 
55 template<class ContainerAllocator >
56 struct DataType<std::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, ContainerAllocator > >
57 {
58  static const char* value()
59  {
60  return DataType<std_msgs::String_<ContainerAllocator> >::value();
61  }
62 
63  static const char* value(const std::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, ContainerAllocator >&)
64  {
65  return value();
66  }
67 };
68 
69 template<class ContainerAllocator >
70 struct Definition<std::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, ContainerAllocator > >
71 {
72  static const char* value()
73  {
74  return Definition<std_msgs::String_<ContainerAllocator> >::value();
75  }
76 
77  static const char* value(const std::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, ContainerAllocator >&)
78  {
79  return value();
80  }
81 };
82 
83 }
84 }
85 
86 #endif
